knownIssues: package.json uses React 19.2.0 / RN 0.83.6 (SDK 55 defaults) — SKILLS.md version lock (18.2.0/0.76.x) predates SDK 55; actual versions are SDK 55 compatible and should NOT be downgraded
crashFixSummary: app.json: added extra.router.root=src so Expo Router finds routes in src/app/
package.json: removed phantom expo-glass-effect and conflicting react-native-worklets
firebase.ts: wrapped initializeAuth in try/catch with getAuth fallback
deleteAccountFlow.ts: static import for expo-notifications (fixes test + dynamic import risk)
fastingService.ts: added persistFastCompletion streak aggregate write
useStreakSync.ts: moved Firestore onSnapshot out of UI into root-layout hook
StreakCounter.tsx: reads from store only (no Firestore in UI)
phase1bSummary: src/types/cycle.ts: CyclePhase const, CyclePhaseType, SymptomScale, SymptomEntry, CycleLog, PhaseRecommendation, PhaseDisplayConfig
src/constants/phases.ts: PHASE_DISPLAY (color/emoji/dayRange per phase), SYMPTOM_LABELS, SYMPTOM_EMOJIS
src/services/cycle/cycleEngine.ts: getCurrentPhase, getCurrentPhaseFromISO, getDayOfCycle, getFastingRecommendation, shouldWarnForProtocol, computeAvgCycleLength
src/services/cycle/cycleService.ts: savePeriodStart, logSymptoms, loadLatestCycleLog, loadPeriodHistory, loadTodaySymptoms
src/stores/cycle/useCycleStore.ts: persisted Zustand store for lastPeriodStart, avgCycleLength, avgPeriodLength, todaySymptoms
src/hooks/useCyclePhase.ts: memoized hook returning phase, dayOfCycle, recommendation, isTracking, warnForProtocol()
src/components/cycle/PhaseCard.tsx: phase emoji + label + day + recommendation + warningLevel badge
src/components/cycle/FastingWarningBanner.tsx: amber/red banner for caution/avoid warning levels
src/components/cycle/SymptomLogger.tsx: 5x5 emoji grid, optimistic save, async onSave prop
src/components/cycle/CycleCalendar.tsx: month grid, phase bg colors, period-start tap, legend
src/app/(tabs)/cycle.tsx: full cycle screen with Firestore sync on mount, day-rollover guard
src/app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx: heart-pulse cycle tab added between Water and Settings
